topic: Dialysis Facility Compare and Star Ratings

primary_sources.name: CMS Dialysis Facility Compare Star Ratings Methodology
primary_sources.relevance: Official methodology for calculating and assigning star ratings to dialysis facilities

primary_sources.name: CMS Quality Reporting Program for ESRD Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive overview of quality measures and reporting requirements for dialysis facilities

primary_sources.name: Impact of CMS Star Ratings on Dialysis Facility Performance
primary_sources.relevance: Analysis of how star ratings affect facility operations and patient outcomes

primary_sources.name: Dialysis Facility Compare Technical Notes
primary_sources.relevance: Detailed technical specifications for quality measures and data collection methods

secondary_sources.name: Kidney Disease Outcomes Quality Initiative Clinical Practice Guidelines
secondary_sources.relevance: Clinical context for quality measures used in star ratings

gaps: Limited peer-reviewed research on patient decision-making using star ratings
Insufficient data on long-term impact of star ratings on industry consolidation
